title: RIP Claude Fable, open-source AI unleashed, full body avatars, new Google models, new TTS: AI NEWS
summary: AI Search presents a weekly news compilation covering 21 recent AI advancements including new models (GLM 5.2, Kimi K2.7, MiniMax M3), text-to-speech systems (Dots TTS), video generation (VideoMDM, Millivid), 3D human avatars (Flex4DHuman), and other research. The video also reports on Claude Fable being banned or discontinued.
writeup: This AI Search roundup surveys the past news cycle, spanning model releases (GLM 5.2, Kimi K2.7, MiniMax M3) and the discontinuation of Claude Fable. It pairs those launches with research across video generation, 3D reconstruction, full body avatars, text-to-speech, and agent benchmarking, plus techniques like sparse attention and diffusion models. The format packs 40+ tools and methods into one pass, with Luma AI as sponsor, making it a wide survey rather than a deep dive on any single system.
